items.summary: In frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx (or whichever component renders the founders section), locate the element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[5]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/img[1] and replace its src with the newly generated profile photo asset at 'frontend/public/assets/generated/founder-photo.dim_400x400.jpg'. Ensure the image renders with proper rounded/circular styling consistent with the existing founder card design.
